title: Bloodhound — Hardware Auto-Detection
concept: AgentAZClaw auto-backend: sniffs out GPU, RAM, downloads right model
metaphor: Bloodhounds detect invisible trails — like detecting GPU capability and finding the right model
prompt: Highly detailed 18th century copperplate engraving of a bloodhound with its nose pressed to the ground, following an invisible scent trail. The trail splits into multiple paths marked with small emblems: a GPU chip, a memory module, a processor die. The bloodhound's collar has a small compass attached. In the background, faint outlines of different model architectures appear like ghostly specimens in glass jars on shelves. Cross-hatching technique throughout, stippled shadows, black ink on cream paper, Buffon natural history folio style. No color. No modern elements.
